name: Inaba Foods Cat Treat Grilled Chicken Fillet In Crab Flavored Broth
description: Treat your cat to the delicious taste of Inaba Foods Grilled Chicken Fillet in Crab Flavored Broth a premium, extra-tender treat made with wholesome ingredients you can trust. Crafted from farm-raised chicken and packed in a savory crab-flavored broth, each hand-cut fillet helps support hydration while delivering irresistible flavor. Each fillet is vacuum-sealed in innovative UV-blocking packaging to preserve freshness and nutrients. Free from grains, preservatives, and artificial colors, this nutritious treat is enriched with Vitamin E to support immunity and Green Tea Extract for antioxidant protection. Serve by hand for bonding time, use as a topper, or offer as a special reward your cat will love every bite. Key Benefits . Made with high-quality farm-raised chicken . Moisture-rich broth supports hydration . Grain-free & free from artificial colors & preservatives . Enriched with Vitamin E & Green Tea Extract antioxidants . Perfect for hand-feeding, topping, or rewarding . Vacuum-sealed for freshness . Suitable for cats of all life stages Ingredients Chicken, Natural Crab Flavored Broth, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 18.0% Crude Fat (min): 0.8% Crude Fiber (max): 0.5% Moisture (max): 75.0% Vitamin E (min): 18 IU/kg Calories: 1118 kcal/kg | 28 kcal per piece Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only and not as a complete meal. Provide clean, fresh drinking water daily. Storage Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible for maximum freshness.
